data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The requirement states that field scopes must include booking-level, customer profile, service configuration, and provider profile. However, the evidence provided only confirms coverage for certain field types (text, number, boolean, dropdown) and lacks evidence for others (date, multi-select, URL, color picker). This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage as specified in the linked use case.
gaps: Missing evidence for field types: date, multi-select, URL, color picker.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
